records.ety: [OE. enprisonen, OF. enprisoner, F. emprisonner; pref. en- (L. in) + F. & OF. prison. See Prison.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Imprisoned (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Imprisoning.]

defs: To put in prison or jail; To arrest and detain in custody; to confine.
quotes: He imprisoned was in chains remediless.

defs: To limit, restrain, or confine in any way.
quotes: Try to imprison the resistless wind.
